name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy — SDK install, auth, project bind, plus every feature module (experiments + metrics, gates + configs + kill switches, alert rules, translations, in-app feedback, see() error tracking) in a single plugin. The see skill guides structured error reporting (see(err).causes_the(subject).to(outcome), see.Violation, see.ControlFlowException) into the errors primitive; tracked errors support a status write (PATCH, open/resolved/ignored). Day-to-day CRUD — creating/listing/updating/archiving gates, configs, kill switches, experiments, metrics, alert rules, ops items, and i18n keys — runs through the registered shipeasy MCP server or the shipeasy CLI; the eight area skills (flags, experiments, metrics, i18n, alerts, ops, see, setup) carry the guidance and always delegate to one of those two surfaces. Slash commands are reserved for multi-step workflows: /shipeasy:setup; the three installs /shipeasy:ops:install (feedback + errors + alerts), /shipeasy:flags:install (gates + configs + kill switches + experiments + events + alert rules), and /shipeasy:i18n:install (translations); the i18n codemods /shipeasy:i18n:{extract,migrate,translate}; and the operational loop /shipeasy:ops:work (bugs + feature requests + auto-filed error/alert tickets; --pr opens one PR per fixed item with Closes #issue) plus its scheduler /shipeasy:ops:create_trigger. Deletions are UI-only; the plugin ships no delete commands.
